column1: Through several energy efficient initiatives, we maintained a reduction of our carbon footprints while
optimally utilizing available resources. Signature Pads to enable customers electronically deposit and
withdraw cash, as well as register complaints to reduce paper usage in some subsidiaries are still in use with
possible expansion across the Group. Also, circulation of paper was reduced to encourage reuse of used paper
with similar actions taken across subsidiaries to reduce paper usage in the workplace by implementing the use
of other electronic means of transmitting information i.e., emails, Microsoft Team, Zoom, among others.
